channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Baltijos tyrimai for ELTA, 19 February–2 March 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
6 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Baltijos tyrimai for ELTA, 19 February–2 March 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/lithuanian_ep_polls/2026-03-02-Baltijostyrimai.html
